scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name su-cs-practice --branch wrangler-smoke --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name su-cs-practice --branch master --commit-dirty=true
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:component && npm run test:gui
